channel.title: benchmarking DEA on Misja Mikkers
channel.description: Recent content in benchmarking DEA on Misja Mikkers

item.title: A benchmarking example in R
item.description: Introduction In this post we will give you an example of a DEA benchmark performed in R. We will do this with simulated data. In this case study we consider 100 courts. Courts handle ‘disputes’, which result in cases or settlements. Hence, settlements and cases are (perfect) substitutes. On the input side, courts incur costs. We consider several DEA models for benchmarking courts. The aim of this example is to learn how to apply DEA and to demonstrate that DEA is capable to reveal inefficiency.
